overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an astronaut in a spacesuit exploring dark, industrial spaceship corridors illuminated by red emergency lighting. The character walks past numbered server racks and interacts with machinery and computer terminals in a sci-fi horror atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit industrial corridor with red emergency lighting. Server racks numbered 28 through 23 line both sides, featuring ventilation fans and glowing indicators. The corridor leads toward a brightly lit doorway with an emergency exit sign visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor with mixed lighting conditions

events.description: passes through the lit doorway into a brighter area with different wall textures
turns left around a corner, changing direction in the corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through the lit doorway and navigating a left turn around a corner

entered.detail: server rack with number 22
server rack with number 21
server rack with number 20
server rack labeled 030
server rack labeled 035
illuminated control panel with buttons and screens

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the lit doorway into a transitional area with mixed lighting. After turning left around a corner, the corridor features server racks 22, 21, and 20, leading toward a junction with racks labeled 030 and 035. A control console is visible in the center of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: server maintenance corridor with interactive machinery

events.description: pulls a lever on server rack 5 to activate or deactivate machinery

agents.ego_description: approaching server rack 5 and pulling a large lever to manipulate the machinery

server rack with number 9 visible in the distance
mechanical lever with glass cover on rack 5

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through the maintenance corridor to server rack 5, where they interact with a lever mechanism. After pulling the lever, they continue past rack 9 toward a green-lit section of the corridor, with previous racks fading into the distance behind them.

scene_state.functional_zone: computer terminal station with scattered debris

events.description: accesses the computer terminal and navigates through the interface
computer screen changes from data display to red error warning

agents.ego_description: accessing a computer terminal and reviewing system data before an error warning appears on screen

entered.detail: standalone computer workstation with monitor and keyboard
illuminated screen displaying system data and error messages
debris and discarded items on the floor near the terminal
metal desk supporting the computer terminal

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a debris-strewn area to reach a computer terminal station. After accessing the terminal, the screen initially displays system data before transitioning to a red error warning with an alert symbol, indicating a system malfunction or security breach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of industrial spaceship corridors that transition from red emergency lighting to a high-alert terminal station. It begins by following the character through a narrow hallway lined with numbered server racks and glowing indicators, moving steadily toward a brightly lit doorway. As the character passes through this threshold and turns a corner, the environment shifts into a transitional maintenance area featuring a central control console and further rows of server equipment. The scene then progresses past a lever mechanism and through a green-lit section of the corridor, leaving the previous racks behind as the path becomes strewn with debris. Finally, the camera reaches a computer terminal where the screen shifts from standard system data to a flashing red error warning and alert symbol.
